All right, we are on to the next lesson, finding your challenge materials. Super simple three step process that we are going to follow. So your challenge is completely ready to go and customized for your gym. So number one, we're gonna step, or we're gonna head over to the playbook course within this portal, and I'll show you at the end of it what that looks like, but we're gonna head over there. Step two, we are going to find the challenge that you are currently running. So whether it is the six week challenge, the 42 day detox, the 12 week HTTP, reactivation play, maybe one of the internal plays, we're gonna find that in the playbook course, and we are going to get the materials. So once we get there, step three is download and customize. Okay, so maybe you have to customize member funnels. And in the playbook, it will show you exactly how to do all of that stuff, but maybe you have to customize a six week or a 42 day member funnel. There maybe you wanna print off the nutrition plans for the 1.25 through 2.75, which was used or is used in the six week challenge. Maybe you wanna do custom nutrition plans, and you wanna print those off and fill those out for your challengers, like you do for HTTP or online, or maybe you wanna do play specific nutrition plans like 28 day summer slim down. So anything, all of that stuff is located in the playbook, and we need to head over there and get all of that stuff based on which challenge you're running. So make sure that you have all of this done before your challenge begins. Don't do it like during your challenge. It has to be done before you start your challenge, and you'll be adding these materials and member funnels to your text campaigns, where your clients can log in to view or print. So you'll be dropping links in your campaign, in your texting that you're sending out to your challengers, and they'll be able to click on it, log into your member portal, print off nutrition plans, whatever they wanna do on their end. You're just giving them all the materials, so you need to make sure that you have it done and customized before you send it out to them. Otherwise they're gonna get incomplete materials. Pro tip, some materials you'll wanna have ready by way and day, like the 1.25 through 2.75 meal plans, that way you can hand it to them on way and day, or if you're doing an internal play, like a 28 day summer slim down, you'll wanna hand them that, or if you're doing a custom meal plan on way and day, you'll fill that out with them. So that's all covered in the playbook, but I just wanted to let you know that some of those might come in handy even before way and day, if you have those customized and ready for yourself. So let's jump over into the playbook. This is what the course will look like, and you'll see that we have the overview, which will cover all of the specific plays and how we're gonna best utilize them. Then you can easily click into whichever player running, let's say you're doing the 20 or the 42 day detox, you'll click on that, and here you can see the meal plans, the nutrition explained, imported to your member funnel. So you just have to go through all of this stuff before your challenge begins, and then it'll show you how to customize it. Where to put your distributor link, where how to film your favorite supplements, all of that stuff, it's covered in here, but what I just wanted to go over now, as far as challenge fulfillment goes, is we need to have this done before you begin your challenge, not like within your first week or something like that. So now that we've covered all of that, let's jump into the next lesson.
